description_long: This is a modern, rectangular chaise upholstered in a deep teal fabric with a subtle sheen. The backrest and inner sides feature a tufted diamond pattern, giving it a luxurious, classic look. Two cylindrical bolster cushions are placed at each end, providing additional comfort and support. The armrests are straight and extend to the same height as the backrest, creating a boxy, enclosed seating area. The seat consists of two large, flat cushions, and the chaise stands on four short, dark wooden legs. The overall design is elegant and suitable for upscale urban environments such as lobbies, lounges, or stylish public spaces.
description: A deep teal, tufted chaise with straight armrests, two bolster cushions, and short dark legs, exuding a modern yet classic elegance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tufted backrest, two seat cushions, and both bolster cushions clearly.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight armrest and the depth of the seat, with one bolster cushion visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain, unadorned back panel and the full width of the chaise.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the other armrest and bolster cushion.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is straight, full-length, and features a tufted diamond pattern with deep buttoning, giving it a plush, classic appearance. It is of medium height and seamlessly connects to the armrests.
attribute_armrest_presence: The chaise has armrests on both sides, which are straight, boxy, and extend to the same height as the backrest.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are short, straight, and appear to be made of dark wood, with a simple, unadorned finish and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is a solid teal color with a prominent tufted diamond pattern on the backrest and inner sides, while the seat cushions are smooth and unpatterned.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two large, flat seat cushions placed side by side, and two cylindrical bolster cushions positioned at each end of the chaise. All cushions appear loose but fit snugly within the frame.
